test_cases.test_case: Search for hotels with valid destination and date range
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Hotels tab on the search widget
2. Enter 'New York' in the Destination field
3. Select '2023-12-01' as the check-in date and '2023-12-05' as the check-out date
4. Set 1 room and 2 guests (1 adult, 1 child)
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the hotel listing page showing available hotels for New York from December 1 to December 5; each card displays hotel name, rating, and starting price per night

test_cases.test_case: Search for flights with missing departure city
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab on the search widget
2. Leave the Departure City field empty
3. Enter 'Los Angeles' in the Arrival City field
4. Select '2023-12-10' as the travel date
5. Set 1 adult passenger
6. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error is shown on the Departure City field; no flight search is initiated

test_cases.test_case: Search for tours with a travel date range of the same day
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Tours tab on the search widget
2. Enter 'Paris' in the Destination field
3. Select today's date as both the start and end date for the travel date range
4. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the tours listing page; results show available tours in Paris for today, or an appropriate message if no tours are available

test_cases.test_case: Search for cars with invalid drop-off date before pick-up date
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Cars tab on the search widget
2. Enter 'Los Angeles' in the Pick-up Location field
3. Select '2023-12-10' as the Pick-up Date
4. Select '2023-12-09' as the Drop-off Date
5. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error is shown indicating that the Drop-off Date must be after the Pick-up Date; no car search is initiated

test_cases.test_case: Search for flights with maximum passenger count
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab on the search widget
2. Enter 'New York' in the Departure City field
3. Enter 'London' in the Arrival City field
4. Select '2023-12-15' as the travel date
5. Set 9 adults, 5 children, and 2 infants as the passenger count
6. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the flight listing page showing available flights for the specified passenger count, or an appropriate message if no flights are available

test_cases.test_case: Register a new account with valid details
preconditions: User is on the Registration page
steps: 1. Fill in First Name, Last Name, Email, and Mobile Number with valid values
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
3. Enter the same password in the Confirm Password field
4. Fill in Address and select a Country from the dropdown
5. Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox
6. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: User is automatically logged in and redirected to their dashboard; a success message is displayed

test_cases.test_case: Register a new account with an invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the Registration page
steps: 1. Fill in First Name, Last Name, and Mobile Number with valid values
2. Enter an invalid email format in the Email field
3. Enter a valid password in the Password field
4. Enter the same password in the Confirm Password field
5. Fill in Address and select a Country from the dropdown
6. Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox
7. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error is shown on the Email field; the account is not created

test_cases.test_case: Register a new account with a password that does not match the confirmation field
preconditions: User is on the Registration page
steps: 1. Fill in First Name, Last Name, Email, and Mobile Number with valid values
2. Enter <password> in the Password field
3. Enter a different value in the Confirm Password field
4. Fill in Address and select a Country from the dropdown
5. Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox
6. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error is shown on the Confirm Password field; the account is not created

test_cases.test_case: Register a new account with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is on the Registration page
steps: 1. Fill in First Name and Last Name with maximum allowed characters
2. Enter a valid email with maximum allowed length
3. Enter a valid password with maximum allowed length
4. Enter the same password in the Confirm Password field
5. Fill in Address with maximum allowed characters and select a Country from the dropdown
6. Enter a valid Mobile Number
7. Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox
8. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: User is automatically logged in and redirected to their dashboard; a success message is displayed

test_cases.test_case: Register a new account with empty fields
preconditions: User is on the Registration page
steps: 1. Leave all fields empty
2. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors are shown for all required fields; the account is not created

test_cases.test_case: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Enter a valid email address in the Email field
2. Enter the correct password in the Password field
3. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to their dashboard or the page they were previously trying to access

test_cases.test_case: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Enter an invalid email address in the Email field
2. Enter an incorrect password in the Password field
3. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials; the Password field is cleared

test_cases.test_case: Login after multiple failed attempts requiring CAPTCHA
preconditions: User is on the Login page
User has failed to login multiple times
steps: 1. Enter a valid email address in the Email field
2. Enter an incorrect password in the Password field
3. Click the Login button multiple times to trigger CAPTCHA
4. Complete the CAPTCHA verification
5. Enter the correct password in the Password field
6. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to their dashboard or the page they were previously trying to access after successful CAPTCHA verification

test_cases.test_case: Request password reset with a valid email
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password page
steps: 1. Enter a valid email address that exists in the system in the Email field
2. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: A confirmation message is shown indicating that a reset link has been sent to the email address; user remains on the Forgot Password page

test_cases.test_case: Request password reset with an email that does not exist
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password page
steps: 1. Enter an email address that does not exist in the system in the Email field
2. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the email address is not found; the form remains editable

test_cases.test_case: Request password reset with an empty email field
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password page
steps: 1. Leave the Email field empty
2. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the email field cannot be empty; the form remains editable

test_cases.test_case: Request password reset with an email at maximum length
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password page
steps: 1. Enter an email address with the maximum allowed length (e.g., 254 characters) in the Email field
2. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: A confirmation message is shown indicating that a reset link has been sent to the email address; user remains on the Forgot Password page

test_cases.test_case: Search for hotels with valid destination and date range
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Hotels tab on the search widget
2. Enter 'New York' in the Destination field
3. Select '2023-12-01' as the check-in date and '2023-12-05' as the check-out date
4. Set 1 room and 2 guests
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the hotel listing page showing available hotels for New York from December 1 to December 5; each card displays hotel name, location, star rating, thumbnail image, starting price per night, amenity icons, and a Book Now button

test_cases.test_case: Search for hotels with missing destination
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Hotels tab on the search widget
2. Leave the Destination field empty
3. Select '2023-12-01' as the check-in date and '2023-12-05' as the check-out date
4. Set 1 room and 2 guests
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the destination field is required; the user remains on the same page

test_cases.test_case: Search for hotels with check-in date equal to check-out date
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Hotels tab on the search widget
2. Enter 'Los Angeles' in the Destination field
3. Select '2023-12-01' as both the check-in and check-out date
4. Set 1 room and 1 guest
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the hotel listing page; results show available hotels for December 1, or an appropriate message if no hotels are available

test_cases.test_case: Search for hotels with invalid date range (check-out before check-in)
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Hotels tab on the search widget
2. Enter 'Miami' in the Destination field
3. Select '2023-12-05' as the check-in date and '2023-12-01' as the check-out date
4. Set 1 room and 2 guests
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the check-out date must be after the check-in date; the user remains on the same page

test_cases.test_case: Search for hotels with maximum number of rooms and guests
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Hotels tab on the search widget
2. Enter 'Chicago' in the Destination field
3. Select '2023-12-01' as the check-in date and '2023-12-10' as the check-out date
4. Set 5 rooms and 10 guests (2 adults and 8 children)
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the hotel listing page showing available hotels for Chicago from December 1 to December 10; results accommodate the specified number of rooms and guests

test_cases.test_case: Book a room with valid user details
preconditions: User is logged in
User is on the hotel details page
steps: 1. Select a room type from the available options
2. Enter stay dates in the check-in and check-out fields
3. Set the number of guests
4. Fill in First Name, Last Name, Email, and Phone Number with valid values
5. Optionally enter a Special Request
6. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the payment page with a summary of the selected hotel, room type, stay dates, guest count, and price breakdown

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to book a room without being logged in
preconditions: User is on the hotel details page
steps: 1. Select a room type from the available options
2. Enter stay dates in the check-in and check-out fields
3. Set the number of guests
4. Fill in First Name, Last Name, Email, and Phone Number with valid values
5. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: User is shown an error message indicating that they must be logged in to book a room

test_cases.test_case: Book a room with maximum length of special requests
preconditions: User is logged in
User is on the hotel details page
steps: 1. Select a room type from the available options
2. Enter stay dates in the check-in and check-out fields
3. Set the number of guests
4. Fill in First Name, Last Name, Email, and Phone Number with valid values
5. Enter a Special Request with maximum allowed characters
6. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the payment page with a summary of the selected hotel, room type, stay dates, guest count, and price breakdown, including the special request

test_cases.test_case: Book a room with missing required fields
preconditions: User is logged in
User is on the hotel details page
steps: 1. Select a room type from the available options
2. Enter stay dates in the check-in and check-out fields
3. Set the number of guests
4. Leave First Name and Last Name fields empty
5. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors are shown for the First Name and Last Name fields; the booking is not processed

test_cases.test_case: Search for flights with valid input
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab on the search widget
2. Select 'One-way' as the trip type
3. Enter 'New York' in the Departure City field
4. Enter 'Los Angeles' in the Arrival City field
5. Select a valid travel date in the Travel Date field
6. Set 1 adult passenger
7. Select 'Economy' as the cabin class
8. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the flight listing page showing available flights with airline logo, name, departure and arrival times, total duration, number of stops, price per passenger, and a Select button for each flight

test_cases.test_case: Search for flights with missing departure city
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab on the search widget
2. Select 'Round-trip' as the trip type
3. Leave the Departure City field empty
4. Enter 'Los Angeles' in the Arrival City field
5. Select a valid travel date in the Travel Date field
6. Set 1 adult passenger
7. Select 'Business' as the cabin class
8. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error is shown for the Departure City field; no search is performed

test_cases.test_case: Search for flights with maximum passenger count
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab on the search widget
2. Select 'Multi-city' as the trip type
3. Enter 'New York' in the Departure City field
4. Enter 'Los Angeles' in the Arrival City field
5. Select a valid travel date in the Travel Date field
6. Set 9 adult passengers, 2 children, and 1 infant
7. Select 'Premium Economy' as the cabin class
8. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the flight listing page showing available flights for the specified number of passengers; results are displayed correctly

test_cases.test_case: Search for flights with same departure and arrival city
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab on the search widget
2. Select 'One-way' as the trip type
3. Enter 'New York' in the Departure City field
4. Enter 'New York' in the Arrival City field
5. Select a valid travel date in the Travel Date field
6. Set 1 adult passenger
7. Select 'Economy' as the cabin class
8. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the flight listing page; results show no available flights or an appropriate message indicating no flights can be booked for the same departure and arrival city

test_cases.test_case: Book a flight with valid passenger details
preconditions: User is on the Flight Booking page
steps: 1. Verify the itinerary summary is displayed correctly
2. Enter 'Mr' in the Title field
3. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
4. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
5. Enter '1990-01-01' in the Date of Birth field
6. Enter 'A12345678' in the Passport Number field
7. Enter '2030-01-01' in the Passport Expiry field
8. Enter 'john.doe@example.com' in the Email field
9. Enter '1234567890' in the Phone field
10. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the payment page with a summary of the booking and fare breakdown

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to book a flight with missing required fields
preconditions: User is on the Flight Booking page
steps: 1. Verify the itinerary summary is displayed correctly
2. Leave the Title field empty
3. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
4. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
5. Leave the Date of Birth field empty
6. Leave the Passport Number field empty
7. Leave the Passport Expiry field empty
8. Enter 'john.doe@example.com' in the Email field
9. Enter '1234567890' in the Phone field
10. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors are shown for the empty required fields; the user cannot proceed to the payment page

test_cases.test_case: Book a flight with a passport number at the maximum length
preconditions: User is on the Flight Booking page
steps: 1. Verify the itinerary summary is displayed correctly
2. Enter 'Mr' in the Title field
3. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
4. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
5. Enter '1990-01-01' in the Date of Birth field
6. Enter 'A123456789012345' in the Passport Number field
7. Enter '2030-01-01' in the Passport Expiry field
8. Enter 'john.doe@example.com' in the Email field
9. Enter '1234567890' in the Phone field
10. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the payment page with a summary of the booking and fare breakdown, indicating that the maximum length for the passport number is accepted

test_cases.test_case: Search for tours with valid destination and travel dates
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search page
steps: 1. Enter <destination> in the Destination field
2. Select <start date> and <end date> for travel dates
3. Choose <tour type> from the dropdown
4. Enter <duration> in days
5. Set <budget range>
6. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the tours listing page showing available tours for the selected criteria; each card displays tour image, name, destination, duration, starting price per person, a brief description, availability status, and traveler rating

test_cases.test_case: Search for tours with missing destination
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search page
steps: 1. Leave the Destination field empty
2. Select <start date> and <end date> for travel dates
3. Choose <tour type> from the dropdown
4. Enter <duration> in days
5. Set <budget range>
6. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error is shown on the Destination field; no tours are displayed

test_cases.test_case: Search for tours with maximum budget range
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search page
steps: 1. Enter <destination> in the Destination field
2. Select <start date> and <end date> for travel dates
3. Choose <tour type> from the dropdown
4. Enter <duration> in days
5. Set budget range to the maximum allowable value
6. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the tours listing page; results show available tours within the maximum budget range, or an appropriate message if no tours are available

test_cases.test_case: Search for tours with a duration of zero days
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search page
steps: 1. Enter <destination> in the Destination field
2. Select <start date> and <end date> for travel dates
3. Choose <tour type> from the dropdown
4. Enter 0 in the Duration field
5. Set <budget range>
6. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the tours listing page; results may show an appropriate message indicating that a duration of zero days is not valid, or display tours with a minimum duration if applicable

test_cases.test_case: Book a tour with valid details
preconditions: User is on the Tour Details page
steps: 1. Select a departure date from the available options
2. Specify the number of travelers (adults and children)
3. Click the Book Now button
4. Fill in traveler names, contact details, and any special requirements
5. Review the total cost breakdown
6. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: User receives a booking confirmation message and is redirected to the booking summary page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to book a tour without selecting a departure date
preconditions: User is on the Tour Details page
steps: 1. Leave the departure date field empty
2. Specify the number of travelers (adults and children)
3. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the departure date is required; the booking process does not proceed

test_cases.test_case: Book a tour with maximum number of travelers
preconditions: User is on the Tour Details page
steps: 1. Select a departure date from the available options
2. Specify the maximum number of travelers allowed (e.g., 10 adults and 10 children)
3. Click the Book Now button
4. Fill in traveler names, contact details, and any special requirements
5. Review the total cost breakdown
6. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: User receives a booking confirmation message and is redirected to the booking summary page; total cost reflects the maximum number of travelers

test_cases.test_case: Book a tour with invalid contact details
preconditions: User is on the Tour Details page
steps: 1. Select a departure date from the available options
2. Specify the number of travelers (adults and children)
3. Click the Book Now button
4. Enter invalid contact details (e.g., incorrect email format)
5. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the contact details are invalid; the booking process does not proceed

test_cases.test_case: Book a tour with special requirements exceeding character limit
preconditions: User is on the Tour Details page
steps: 1. Select a departure date from the available options
2. Specify the number of travelers (adults and children)
3. Click the Book Now button
4. Fill in traveler names and contact details
5. Enter a special requirement that exceeds the maximum character limit
6. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the special requirements exceed the character limit; the booking process does not proceed

test_cases.test_case: Search for cars with valid pick-up and drop-off details
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Cars tab on the search widget
2. Enter <pick-up location> in the Pick-up Location field
3. Enter <drop-off location> in the Drop-off Location field
4. Select <pick-up date> and <pick-up time>
5. Select <drop-off date> and <drop-off time>
6. Enter <driver age>
7. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the car listing page showing available vehicles grouped by category; each listing displays vehicle image, make and model, transmission type, fuel policy, seating and luggage capacity, feature icons, price per day, total rental cost, and a Book Now button

test_cases.test_case: Search for cars with missing pick-up location
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Cars tab on the search widget
2. Leave the Pick-up Location field empty
3. Enter <drop-off location> in the Drop-off Location field
4. Select <pick-up date> and <pick-up time>
5. Select <drop-off date> and <drop-off time>
6. Enter <driver age>
7. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the Pick-up Location is required; the search is not executed

test_cases.test_case: Search for cars with pick-up and drop-off dates set to the same day and time
preconditions: User is on the PHPTravels home page
steps: 1. Click the Cars tab on the search widget
2. Enter <pick-up location> in the Pick-up Location field
3. Enter <drop-off location> in the Drop-off Location field
4. Select today's date as the pick-up date and time
5. Select the same date and time as the drop-off date and time
6. Enter <driver age>
7. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the car listing page; results show available vehicles for the same-day rental, or an appropriate message if no vehicles are available

test_cases.test_case: Successfully book a car with valid details
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page
steps: 1. Enter valid Driver Full Name
2. Enter valid Age (e.g., 30)
3. Enter valid License Number
4. Select valid License Issue Country
5. Enter valid Email
6. Enter valid Phone Number
7. Select rental period and pick-up/drop-off locations and times
8. Choose an insurance plan
9. Accept the terms and conditions
10. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the payment page with a summary of the booking details and pricing breakdown

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to book a car with an invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page
steps: 1. Enter valid Driver Full Name
2. Enter valid Age
3. Enter valid License Number
4. Select valid License Issue Country
5. Enter invalid Email (e.g., 'user@domain')
6. Enter valid Phone Number
7. Select rental period and pick-up/drop-off locations and times
8. Choose an insurance plan
9. Accept the terms and conditions
10. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error is shown on the Email field; the booking is not processed

test_cases.test_case: Book a car with the minimum age requirement
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page
steps: 1. Enter valid Driver Full Name
2. Enter minimum valid Age (e.g., 18)
3. Enter valid License Number
4. Select valid License Issue Country
5. Enter valid Email
6. Enter valid Phone Number
7. Select rental period and pick-up/drop-off locations and times
8. Choose an insurance plan
9. Accept the terms and conditions
10. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the payment page with a summary of the booking details and pricing breakdown, confirming that booking is allowed for the minimum age

test_cases.test_case: View visa requirements for valid nationality and destination country
preconditions: User is on the Visa Services page
steps: 1. Select a valid Nationality from the dropdown
2. Select a valid Destination Country from the dropdown
3. Click the 'View Requirements' button
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays the visa requirements including visa type, processing time, required documents, and fees for the selected nationality and destination country

test_cases.test_case: Submit visa application with missing required fields
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application form page
steps: 1. Fill in Full Name, Passport Number, and Date of Birth with valid values
2. Leave the Passport Expiry Date field empty
3. Fill in Nationality, Email, and Phone with valid values
4. Fill in Purpose of Visit and Intended Travel Dates with valid values
5. Click the Submit button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the Passport Expiry Date is required; the application is not submitted

test_cases.test_case: Submit visa application with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application form page
steps: 1. Fill in Full Name with 100 characters
2. Enter a valid Passport Number with maximum allowed characters
3. Set Passport Expiry Date to a valid future date
4. Enter Date of Birth with a valid date
5. Select Nationality from the dropdown
6. Enter a valid Email and Phone number
7. Fill in Purpose of Visit with maximum allowed characters
8. Set Intended Travel Dates to valid future dates
9. Upload required documents including passport copy and photographs
10. Click the Submit button
test_cases.expected_result: The application is submitted successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed; the user can track the application status in the dashboard

test_cases.test_case: View upcoming bookings in My Bookings section
preconditions: User is logged into the User Dashboard
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Bookings section
2. Observe the list of upcoming bookings
test_cases.expected_result: User sees a list of upcoming bookings with booking reference, service type, travel dates, and status

test_cases.test_case: Edit personal information in My Profile section
preconditions: User is logged into the User Dashboard
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Profile section
2. Click the Edit button
3. Update First Name and Last Name
4. Click Save
test_cases.expected_result: User's personal information is updated successfully and a confirmation message is displayed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to cancel a booking that is already cancelled
preconditions: User is logged into the User Dashboard
User has a booking with status 'Cancelled'
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Bookings section
2. Locate the cancelled booking
3. Click the Cancel button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the booking cannot be cancelled again

test_cases.test_case: Try to modify a booking that is in 'Pending' status
preconditions: User is logged into the User Dashboard
User has a booking with status 'Pending'
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Bookings section
2. Locate the pending booking
3. Click the Modify button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the booking cannot be modified at this time

test_cases.test_case: View transaction history with no transactions
preconditions: User is logged into the User Dashboard
User has no transaction history
steps: 1. Navigate to the Wallet/Credits section
test_cases.expected_result: User sees a message indicating that there are no transactions available

test_cases.test_case: Change password with a new password that is the same as the old password
preconditions: User is logged into the User Dashboard
steps: 1. Navigate to the Settings section
2. Click on Change Password
3. Enter the current password
4. Enter the same password in the New Password field
5. Click Save
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the new password must be different from the current password

test_cases.test_case: View booking details with valid confirmation number
preconditions: User is logged in
User has a valid booking
steps: 1. Navigate to the Booking Management section
2. Enter a valid confirmation number in the search field
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: User sees the booking details including confirmation number, service information, traveler details, payment information, and current booking status

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to modify booking with invalid traveler information
preconditions: User is logged in
User has a valid booking
steps: 1. Navigate to the Booking Management section
2. Enter a valid confirmation number in the search field
3. Click the Modify button
4. Change the traveler information to invalid values (e.g., empty name)
5. Click Save Changes
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the traveler information is invalid; changes are not saved

test_cases.test_case: Cancel a booking with a non-refundable policy
preconditions: User is logged in
User has a valid booking with a non-refundable policy
steps: 1. Navigate to the Booking Management section
2. Enter a valid confirmation number in the search field
3. Click the Cancel button
4. Confirm the cancellation in the confirmation dialog
test_cases.expected_result: User sees a message indicating that the booking has been canceled and that no refund will be issued; the booking status is updated accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Modify booking with maximum allowed special requests
preconditions: User is logged in
User has a valid booking
steps: 1. Navigate to the Booking Management section
2. Enter a valid confirmation number in the search field
3. Click the Modify button
4. Add the maximum number of special requests allowed
5. Click Save Changes
test_cases.expected_result: User sees a success message indicating that the booking has been modified with the special requests; the updated details are displayed

test_cases.test_case: Complete payment with valid credit card details
preconditions: User is on the Payment page with a full booking summary displayed
steps: 1. Enter valid Cardholder Name
2. Enter a valid Card Number
3. Select a valid Expiration Date
4. Enter a valid CVV
5. Check the option to save the card for future use
6. Click the Pay Now button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the booking confirmation page with a reference number; an invoice is available for download, and a confirmation email is sent

test_cases.test_case: Attempt payment with an expired credit card
preconditions: User is on the Payment page with a full booking summary displayed
steps: 1. Enter valid Cardholder Name
2. Enter a valid Card Number
3. Select an Expiration Date that is in the past
4. Enter a valid CVV
5. Click the Pay Now button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the card is expired; the user remains on the payment page

test_cases.test_case: Complete payment with a credit card that has a zero balance
preconditions: User is on the Payment page with a full booking summary displayed
steps: 1. Enter valid Cardholder Name
2. Enter a valid Card Number with zero balance
3. Select a valid Expiration Date
4. Enter a valid CVV
5. Click the Pay Now button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating 'Insufficient funds'; the user remains on the payment page

test_cases.test_case: Complete payment using PayPal
preconditions: User is on the Payment page with a full booking summary displayed
steps: 1. Select PayPal as the payment method
2. Click the Pay Now button
3. Log in to PayPal account with valid credentials
4. Confirm the payment
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the booking confirmation page with a reference number; an invoice is available for download, and a confirmation email is sent

test_cases.test_case: Attempt payment with invalid credit card number
preconditions: User is on the Payment page with a full booking summary displayed
steps: 1. Enter valid Cardholder Name
2. Enter an invalid Card Number (e.g., 1234 5678 9012 3456)
3. Select a valid Expiration Date
4. Enter a valid CVV
5. Click the Pay Now button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the card number is invalid; the user remains on the payment page

test_cases.test_case: Select a different currency and verify price updates
preconditions: User is on any page of the PHPTravels site
steps: 1. Click on the currency selector dropdown
2. Select <desired currency> from the list
3. Observe the prices displayed on the page
test_cases.expected_result: All prices on the page are updated to reflect the selected currency without losing the current search context

test_cases.test_case: Change the language and verify interface updates
preconditions: User is on any page of the PHPTravels site
steps: 1. Click on the language selector dropdown
2. Select <desired language> from the list
3. Observe the navigation labels and content on the page
test_cases.expected_result: The entire site interface updates to the selected language, including navigation labels and form content

test_cases.test_case: Select an unsupported currency
preconditions: User is on any page of the PHPTravels site
steps: 1. Click on the currency selector dropdown
2. Select <unsupported currency> from the list
3. Observe the prices displayed on the page
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the selected currency is not supported; prices remain unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Select a language that is not available
preconditions: User is on any page of the PHPTravels site
steps: 1. Click on the language selector dropdown
2. Select <unsupported language> from the list
3. Observe the interface updates
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the selected language is not available; the interface remains in the current language

test_cases.test_case: Select a currency and language in quick succession
preconditions: User is on any page of the PHPTravels site
steps: 1. Click on the currency selector dropdown
2. Select <desired currency>
3. Immediately click on the language selector dropdown
4. Select <desired language>
test_cases.expected_result: The site updates to reflect the selected currency and language without any errors or loss of context

test_cases.test_case: Change language and currency while logged in
preconditions: User is logged into their account and on any page of the PHPTravels site
steps: 1. Click on the currency selector dropdown
2. Select <desired currency>
3. Click on the language selector dropdown
4. Select <desired language>
test_cases.expected_result: The site updates to reflect the selected currency and language, and the preferences are saved to the user's profile

test_cases.test_case: Apply multiple filters for hotel search and verify results
preconditions: User is on the Hotels listing page
steps: 1. Adjust the price range slider to select a range of $100 to $300
2. Select 4-star and 5-star ratings
3. Check the amenities for 'Free Wi-Fi' and 'Pool'
4. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Results update dynamically to show hotels within the selected price range and ratings, displaying only those with the selected amenities

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to apply filters with invalid input
preconditions: User is on the Flights listing page
steps: 1. Select 'One-way' as the trip type
2. Enter invalid departure and arrival cities (e.g., 'XYZ City')
3. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the selected cities are invalid; no results are shown

test_cases.test_case: Apply maximum number of filters for car rentals
preconditions: User is on the Cars listing page
steps: 1. Select the car type as 'SUV'
2. Choose 'Automatic' for transmission
3. Select 'Full' for fuel policy
4. Choose a rental company from the list
5. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Results update to show available SUVs with automatic transmission, full fuel policy, and from the selected rental company; the result count updates accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Reset all filters and verify results
preconditions: User has applied multiple filters on the Tours listing page
steps: 1. Click the Reset all filters button
test_cases.expected_result: All filters are cleared, and the results revert to show all available tours without any filters applied

test_cases.test_case: Submit a review with valid inputs after completing a booking
preconditions: User is logged in and has completed a booking
steps: 1. Navigate to the dashboard
2. Click on the 'Write a Review' button for the completed booking
3. Select a star rating for overall experience and for categories (Cleanliness, Service, Location)
4. Enter written feedback in the comments section
5. Optionally upload guest photos
6. Click the Submit button
test_cases.expected_result: The review is successfully submitted, and a confirmation message is displayed; the review appears in the Reviews section of the item

test_cases.test_case: Submit a review without selecting a rating
preconditions: User is logged in and has completed a booking
steps: 1. Navigate to the dashboard
2. Click on the 'Write a Review' button for the completed booking
3. Leave the star rating fields empty
4. Enter written feedback in the comments section
5. Click the Submit button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that a rating must be selected; the review is not submitted

test_cases.test_case: Submit a review with maximum character limit in comments
preconditions: User is logged in and has completed a booking
steps: 1. Navigate to the dashboard
2. Click on the 'Write a Review' button for the completed booking
3. Select a star rating for overall experience and for categories (Cleanliness, Service, Location)
4. Enter a comment that reaches the maximum character limit allowed
5. Click the Submit button
test_cases.expected_result: The review is successfully submitted, and a confirmation message is displayed; the review appears in the Reviews section of the item

test_cases.test_case: Filter reviews by date with no reviews available
preconditions: User is on the detail page of an item with no reviews
steps: 1. Scroll to the Reviews section
2. Select a date filter option (e.g., Last 30 days)
3. Click the Apply Filter button
test_cases.expected_result: A message is displayed indicating that no reviews are available for the selected date range

test_cases.test_case: View promotional banners and featured deal cards
preconditions: User is on the Offers page
steps: 1. Observe the promotional banners at the top of the page
2. Scroll down to view featured deal cards
test_cases.expected_result: Promotional banners and deal cards are displayed with titles, images, discount percentages, validity periods, and a Book Now button

test_cases.test_case: Filter offers by service type and destination
preconditions: User is on the Offers page
steps: 1. Select 'Hotels' from the service type filter
2. Enter <destination> in the destination field
3. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: The page refreshes to show only hotel offers for the selected destination

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to subscribe to the newsletter with an invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the Offers page
steps: 1. Enter 'invalid-email' in the newsletter subscription field
2. Click the Subscribe button
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the email format is invalid; subscription is not processed

test_cases.test_case: Filter offers with no results
preconditions: User is on the Offers page
steps: 1. Select 'Flights' from the service type filter
2. Enter a destination that has no available offers
3. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: A message is displayed indicating that no offers are available for the selected criteria

test_cases.test_case: Click Book Now on a deal card
preconditions: User is on the Offers page and sees available deals
steps: 1. Click the Book Now button on a featured deal card
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the booking flow with the promotional code applied or a pre-filled search with discounted rates

test_cases.test_case: Logout successfully from the application
preconditions: User is logged into the PHPTravels application
steps: 1. Click the Logout button in the navigation menu
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the home page; session is terminated and sensitive data is cleared

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to access a protected page after logout
preconditions: User is logged into the PHPTravels application
User has logged out
steps: 1. Try to navigate to a protected page (e.g., My Bookings)
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page; access to the protected page is denied

test_cases.test_case: Logout while a session is still active and immediately try to refresh the page
preconditions: User is logged into the PHPTravels application
steps: 1. Click the Logout button in the navigation menu
2. Immediately refresh the page
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the home page; session is terminated and sensitive data is cleared
